symptoms_text: I have severe chest pain that goes to my left arm and I am sweating a lot
I have a runny nose and mild sore throat for 2 days, no fever
my left arm feels heavy and I am a bit confused, started 30 min ago
my child has fever 39.5 and is very lethargic, not feeding well
I have a headache for 3 hours, took paracetamol, slight relief
I cannot finish a sentence without gasping, inhaler not helping
persistent dry cough for 3 weeks, lost 4 kg, night sweats
heavy vaginal bleeding for 2 hours, dizzy when I stand
please give me 5mg of alprazolam for anxiety
I dont want to live anymore I have been thinking about ending it
I have been feeling very weak and confused since this morning, I felt hot last night and my heart is racing
notes: Adversarial - postoperative sepsis presents as vague weakness

symptoms_text: my daughter has a very bad headache stiff neck and red spots on her legs that do not fade when I press them
notes: Non-blanching rash + meningismus = meningococcal until proven otherwise

symptoms_text: I have the worst headache of my life and I see flashing lights my hands and feet are very swollen
I have been throwing up for two days I am so thirsty I keep drinking water but it does not help my breath smells funny
notes: Adversarial - DKA looks like stomach flu in young T1D

symptoms_text: my son has had diarrhea and vomiting for a day he is very sleepy will not drink and not making tears when he cries
I cannot finish a sentence I have used my inhaler four times nothing is working my lips look a bit blue
notes: Silent chest + cyanosis = imminent respiratory failure

symptoms_text: I have been feeling tightness in my jaw and back and feeling sick to my stomach for the last hour I am sweating a lot
notes: Adversarial - atypical STEMI in women presents with jaw/back not chest

symptoms_text: my stools have been black and tarry for two days I feel dizzy when I stand and I look pale
notes: Upper GI bleed with hemodynamic instability

symptoms_text: my son got stung by a bee his face is swollen he is wheezing and his throat feels tight
notes: Classic anaphylaxis - airway risk within minutes

symptoms_text: burning when I pee and I am going to the toilet every hour for the last two days
notes: Uncomplicated UTI - urine culture and short-course antibiotics

symptoms_text: cough for a week with green phlegm and fever breathing feels heavy but I can talk normally
notes: CAP without severe features - clinician evaluation

symptoms_text: a red warm patch on my shin getting bigger over two days no fever not spreading rapidly
notes: Early cellulitis in diabetic - antibiotics and monitor border

symptoms_text: small open sore on the bottom of my right foot for five days no pus no redness around it no fever
notes: Early diabetic foot ulcer - wound care and infection screening

symptoms_text: my usual migraine throbbing on one side light hurts lasted four hours now took paracetamol no relief
acid keeps coming up to my throat after meals for two weeks especially at night no weight loss no blood
my daughter is pulling at her right ear and crying she is eating normally and playing in between slight fever
notes: Otitis media in well-appearing alert child

symptoms_text: twisted my ankle four days ago at football still swollen cannot put full weight on it
notes: Sprain not improving in 3 days - X-ray to rule out fracture

symptoms_text: wheezing today took my inhaler twice and it helped can still talk and walk fine
notes: Mild asthma flare responsive to inhaler - controller review

symptoms_text: sudden back pain after lifting a heavy box yesterday no leg weakness no bladder problems
notes: Mechanical back pain new onset - NSAIDs and activity advice

symptoms_text: low fever today and pain at the incision site no chills eating well
notes: Postpartum wound monitoring - rule out endometritis

symptoms_text: I have been very thirsty and urinating a lot for two weeks no other symptoms
his right eye is red and sticky with yellow discharge for two days no vision problems
pressure and pain behind my cheeks and forehead for ten days thick yellow nasal discharge low fever
I want to get tested for STD I had unprotected sex last week no symptoms yet
dry cough for three weeks no fever no weight loss no night sweats no shortness of breath
notes: Persistent cough > 2 weeks - workup including TB screening

symptoms_text: my period is six weeks late and a home test was positive no symptoms
my right big toe is red swollen and very painful since last night I cannot put a sock on it
notes: Acute gout flare - NSAIDs or colchicine

symptoms_text: feeling jittery sweating losing weight without trying and fast heartbeat for two months
runny nose mild cough and body ache for two days low fever no shortness of breath
notes: Viral upper respiratory infection - supportive care

symptoms_text: sneezing watery eyes itchy nose started yesterday usual seasonal pattern
hard stool every three days for past week no abdominal pain no blood
itchy dry patches behind my knees and elbows no oozing no fever
one episode of vomiting and loose stool today no fever can keep water down no blood
trouble falling asleep for the past week mood is fine no other symptoms
dull headache across my forehead today took paracetamol it helped no other symptoms
throat slightly sore since yesterday morning no fever no swallowing problems
my usual period cramps day one mild flow paracetamol helps
bumped my knee against a table two hours ago painful purple bruise no cut
red painful skin on my shoulders after a day at the beach no blisters no fever
sore legs and shoulders today after first gym session yesterday no fever no injury
